description: The HealthEngine Network is Australia’s largest patient network. Where patients are connecting online with all their favourite healthcare providers. We’re talking upwards of 7 million Australians who’ve made more than 30 million bookings online via HealthEngine.\r\n\r\nAnd we’ve got a whole raft of time, cost and effort-saving tools that make it easier for practices to meet their patients’ growing demands, improve their experience, increase their engagement and win their loyalty.
name: HealthEngine
